notes: Moon face in centre, 8 segments around it, four containing
labeled stars, one of which probably the Pleiades.
Locus C1 is one ring of text around the diagram.
Radiating lines ordered cf. ThP, starting at 10:30
Labels of stars ordered cf. ThP.
Small ring of text around central moon face
